scope.strategy: Build toward the most comprehensive Aedes aegypti intelligence system in the world, while current public claims follow config/aedes-source-plane-benchmark.json.
expansion_order: Anopheles gambiae complex and other primary Anopheles vectors
Culex pipiens complex and other primary Culex vectors

domains.target_state: All materially relevant Aedes aegypti research papers, with metadata, abstracts, legal full text when available, enrichment payloads, and explicit gaps.
current_evidence: artifacts/aedes-literature-2020/source_index.sqlite
artifacts/aedes-literature-2020/literature_enrichment_receipt.json
artifacts/aedes-literature-2020/gaps.json
literature_fulltext_units and literature_fulltext_fts are searchable through search fulltext and literature-answer fallback

aedes_extracted_facts can discover Europe PMC, PMC, and Figshare supplement metadata when opted in and parse supported CSV, TSV, XLSX, DOCX, XML, and HTML supplement tables into row-level fact records with raw-file provenance.
required_next_sources: Crossref or PubMed reconciliation for missing DOI and PMID gaps
deeper PDF, archive, image-table, and claim extraction across behavior, resistance, vector competence, ecology, and public-health papers beyond supported deterministic table formats
completion_evidence: CLI answers use full-text chunks when abstract metadata is insufficient
remaining inaccessible full text is represented as structured gaps
supplement manifests, parsed supported table rows, and extracted candidate facts are queryable with source paper, raw supplement file, row, or full-text-unit provenance

domains.target_state: Reference genomes, genes, proteins, transcripts, variants, orthology, barcodes, expression summaries, microbiome links, strains, and resistance markers for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: ncbi_datasets_genome records in the installed source index

ncbi_biosamples maps bounded NCBI BioSample records for Aedes aegypti into queryable sample metadata atoms with accession, strain or isolate, collection date, geography, tissue, isolation source, organization, and linked SRA identifiers when exposed by NCBI.

vectorbase_aedes_genomics maps official VectorBase/VEuPathDB AaegyptiLVP_AGWG GFF, annotated protein FASTA, annotated CDS FASTA, annotated transcript FASTA, GO GAF, codon usage, identifier event history, and NCBI LinkOut downloads into queryable genes, transcripts, proteins, CDS sequence summaries, transcript sequence summaries, GO annotation, codon usage, ID history, and genome cross-reference records with raw-file provenance.
aedes_expression_omics maps bounded NCBI GEO/SRA expression, RNA-seq, and transcriptome metadata into GEO dataset records and SRA run records with raw ESummary provenance.

aedes_uniprot_proteins maps bounded UniProtKB protein and UniProt proteome metadata into protein records with accession, function comments, gene names, GO and VectorBase cross-references, reviewed status, proteome IDs, and raw JSON provenance.

aedes_population_genomics maps bounded NCBI BioProject population-genomics metadata into genome_features records with accession, title, description, data type, target scope, submitter, registration date, and raw ESummary provenance.
config/source-map.yaml
required_next_sources: NCBI variation links and a larger or complete BioSample mirror beyond the bounded live ingest
computed expression matrices, differential-expression outputs, and raw-read reanalysis receipts for priority GEO/SRA studies
orthology and variant resources not exposed as stable current-release VectorBase auxiliary downloads
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer gene, protein, variant, strain, barcode, and orthology questions with provenance

domains.target_state: Host seeking, biting, oviposition, mating, flight, circadian, larval, repellent, attraction, and insecticide-response behavior records.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates behavior records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 2,816 behavior records from aedes_literature_facets.
Behavior questions route through the behavior lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.

Dryad Aedes behavior/video dataset manifests map public host-seeking, visual-threat, flight-escape, mating/courtship, male host-attraction, and visual-tracking data files to behavior and media records with DOI, file, license, checksum, size, and download provenance.

Mendeley Data Aedes behavior/media manifests map public mate-recognition, wingbeat, hearing, flight-tone, high-speed video, and locomotory video-analysis datasets to behavior and media records with dataset, folder, file, DOI, license, SHA-256, size, content-type, download, and view provenance.

Mendeley public CSV, TSV, and XLSX Aedes behavior table files are parsed into sheet-level and row-level behavior records with headers, row values, row numbers, download URLs, licenses, and raw-file locators.

aedes_vectorbyte_traits maps VectorByte/VecTraits Aedes aegypti trait rows into queryable trait observations with value, unit, temperature, stage, sex, habitat, location, citation, DOI, and raw dataset JSON provenance.

aedes_extracted_facts emits behavior candidate facts from indexed Aedes literature and legal full-text units, and parsed behavior rows from supported public supplement tables, with matched assay, stimulus, sex, age, strain, response metric fields, and source provenance.
required_next_sources: decoded trajectory tables and assay-level rows from Dryad behavior archives
deep parsing of Mendeley sound files, high-speed video archives, and compressed archives into acoustic, assay, and trajectory records
repellent and attractant assay datasets
host-seeking and oviposition experiment metadata
completion_evidence: behavior lane records include behavior type, assay, stimulus, condition, population or strain, source paper or dataset, and provenance locator

domains.target_state: Global Aedes aegypti occurrence, collection, trap, citizen-science, and surveillance observations with date, place, method, certainty, taxon, and provenance.
current_evidence: Hosted artifact contains 82,237 Aedes aegypti GBIF occurrence records plus one GBIF taxonomy record from source gbif_api, with raw page artifacts, payload rows, and zero GBIF gaps in source receipts.
Hosted artifact contains deep Aedes aegypti iNaturalist observation records with raw page artifacts and provenance.
Mosquito Alert Aedes aegypti citizen-science observations are mapped through GBIF dataset 1fef1ead-3d02-495e-8ff1-6aeb01123408 with raw occurrence pages, media metadata, and provenance.

VectorNet ECDC/EFSA regional surveillance rows for Aedes aegypti are mapped from the public IPT Darwin Core Archive with raw archive, filtered-row TSV, row-level observations, ecology summaries, CC-BY-4.0 license, and exact row provenance.

aedes_global_compendium_occurrence maps the Kraemer et al. global Aedes occurrence compendium into row-level Aedes aegypti occurrence records with country, coordinates, year, status, and raw CSV row provenance where exposed.
GBIF, iNaturalist, Mosquito Alert, and VectorNet lanes exist, but Ask Insects is not yet a comprehensive observation mirror across all public surveillance systems.
required_next_sources: additional national and regional surveillance exports where public
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer global, country, date, and source-specific Aedes observation questions with counts and provenance

domains.target_state: Licensed Aedes aegypti images with observation, body part, life stage, view angle, source, license, and inspectable media locator.
current_evidence: Hosted artifact contains deep Aedes aegypti iNaturalist licensed-photo media records with observation context and provenance.
Mosquito Alert Aedes aegypti still-image records preserve GBIF occurrence context plus image URL, rights holder, creator, and media license payloads.
aedes_image_atoms derives image-asset records, deterministic source-provided labels, and image-label gap records from indexed iNaturalist and Mosquito Alert media payloads.

Image atoms preserve source image record ID, source observation record ID, image URL, source URL, license, attribution or creator, rights holder, date, country or place, coordinates when supplied, quality grade when supplied, image format when supplied, and exact upstream locator.

Image atoms can now optionally perform bounded licensed image-byte mirrors, preserving SHA-256 checksum, byte size, raw asset path, detected image format, dimensions, and EXIF presence when detectable, with queryable gaps for unclear licenses, failed downloads, oversized files, or mirror limits.

Hosted Ask Insects currently has 5,828 verified Aedes image-byte mirrors from a bounded licensed run, with 19,439 aedes_image_atoms records, no image-byte mirror gaps, and direct checksum/dimension answers.
Image coverage still does not claim model-derived body part, anatomy, pose, view-angle, sex, or life-stage labels unless the upstream source metadata provides them.
required_next_sources: museum or reference-image collections with licensing
mirror newly added image assets during future observation refreshes
validated vision or manual labels for species, life stage, sex, anatomy, body part, view angle, pose, and image quality
completion_evidence: image questions return media records with license, source URL, observation context, and provenance
image label and image gap questions prefer aedes_image_atoms

domains.target_state: Public Aedes aegypti videos and motion records for behavior, flight, feeding, oviposition, larval motion, and assay clips.
current_evidence: PMC supplementary-video lane maps curated Aedes aegypti article videos into media records with downloadable video locators.
Ask Insects video questions can return bounded PMC moving-image media records once the lane is installed.

Dryad behavior/video dataset manifests add file-grained public Aedes video/archive records for thermal-infrared host seeking, visual-threat avoidance, looming-threat flight escape, mating/courtship/hearing, male attraction, and visual-tracking datasets without mirroring giant binary archives.
Mendeley behavior/media manifests add file-grained public Aedes high-speed video, wingbeat sound, flight-tone hearing, and locomotory video-analysis dataset records without mirroring giant binaries.
Mendeley public behavior table files are parsed into queryable sheet and row records where the file is in Aedes aegypti scope.

OSF FlightTrackAI manifests add file-grained public Aedes aegypti processed/unprocessed flight videos, executable bundle, trained model, and installation-instruction records without mirroring multi-gigabyte binaries.

Zenodo Aedes video sweeps add first-class bounded Zenodo search/file-manifest records for materially Aedes aegypti video files, preserving download URL, source URL, license, byte size, source hashes, and exact raw-search locators.

Figshare Aedes video sweeps add first-class bounded Figshare article-detail file-manifest records for materially Aedes aegypti video files, preserving article ID, file ID, DOI, download URL, source URL, license, byte size, source hashes, and exact raw-detail locators.

Aedes video atoms derive video asset rows, optional bounded mirrors, checksums, byte sizes, ffprobe duration/fps/resolution/codec metadata, thumbnails, keyframes, preview clips, frame manifests, source-table motion rows, and structured gaps for oversized, archive-not-expanded, or license-unclear files.
The May 25, 2026 hosted video-atoms refresh installed 46,036 records: 88 video assets, 21 verified mirrored videos, 84 inspectable artifact records, 45,574 motion rows, and 290 structured video gaps.
Video discovery now requires source-provided material metadata to name Aedes aegypti; repository search terms and synthetic query strings do not count as Aedes evidence.

Video gap records preserve source download URL, source URL, byte size, source-provided hashes when available, license text, source dataset, repository, and locator so huge or license-unclear videos remain inspectable as gaps.
Ask routing now prefers aedes_video_atoms for keyframe, thumbnail, preview, frame, motion, trajectory, tracking, fps, codec, duration, and resolution questions.
required_next_sources: systematic live sweeps of PMC OA supplements, Dryad, Mendeley, OSF, Zenodo, Figshare, institutional repositories, and paper supplements
larger licensed binary mirrors and archive-member extraction where storage and rights allow
computer-vision extraction for videos that lack source trajectory tables
lab assay video metadata where public
completion_evidence: video questions return inspectable media locators, licenses, behavior labels, and provenance, or precise external availability gaps
keyframe, preview, fps, codec, duration, resolution, motion, trajectory, and tracking questions prefer aedes_video_atoms
downloadable video assets either have checksum, byte size, duration, fps, resolution, codec, source paper/dataset, license, and exact locator or a structured gap

domains.target_state: Brain atlas, cell atlas, sensory neuron, connectome, skeleton, voxel, study, and reanalysis records for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: MosquitoBrains, GEO/SRA, Mosquito Cell Atlas, CATMAID metadata, skeleton manifest, and source-gap records in the installed source index.
required_next_sources: complete public whole-brain Aedes connectome bulk package when available
computed SRA alignment and count receipts if raw reanalysis is executed
interactive atlas region and coordinate browser
completion_evidence: brain, neuron, cell atlas, skeleton, voxel, and connectome questions answer from records or explicit public-availability gaps

domains.target_state: Pathogen, strain, mosquito population, infection, dissemination, transmission, dose, temperature, tissue, and experimental-condition records.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates vector_competence records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 4,534 vector_competence records from aedes_literature_facets.
Vector competence questions route through the vector_competence lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.
aedes_pathogen_taxonomy anchors dengue, Zika, chikungunya, yellow fever, West Nile, and Mayaro virus identities to NCBI Taxonomy records for pathogen-specific Aedes aegypti questions.

aedes_vector_competence_assays extracts pathogen-specific assay-candidate records from indexed Aedes literature and legal full-text units, preserving source paper and full-text-unit provenance plus structured pathogen, infection, dissemination, transmission, dose, temperature, tissue, strain, population, and timepoint fields when detected.
aedes_vectorbyte_traits contributes temperature-dependent VecTraits rows such as transmission potential where VectorByte exposes Aedes aegypti trait measurements.

aedes_extracted_facts adds cross-lane vector-competence candidate facts, supplement manifests, and parsed supported supplement table rows from indexed literature payloads, Europe PMC or PMC metadata, public supplement files, and legal full-text units.
required_next_sources: validated table and supplement parsing for vector-competence assay rows beyond deterministic supported-format extraction
manual or model-assisted validation labels for extracted assay candidates
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer pathogen-specific competence questions with assay context and provenance

domains.target_state: Insecticide susceptibility, resistance phenotype, mechanism, mutation, assay protocol, geography, and time records for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: IR Mapper public Aedes JSON endpoint is mapped as irmapper_aedes and filtered by default to Aedes aegypti and Ae. aegypti rows.
Installed records store raw IR Mapper rows in record_payloads with provenance to raw/irmapper/Aedes_aegypti.json row locators.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 2,843 resistance records from aedes_literature_facets.

Hosted artifact contains 6,449 aedes_resistance_markers records mapping kdr, VGSC, and metabolic-resistance marker mentions from indexed Aedes literature and legal full-text units into queryable resistance records with marker payloads, source locators, and zero marker-source gaps.
General resistance questions prefer the dedicated irmapper_aedes lane, while kdr and metabolic-marker questions prefer aedes_resistance_markers before literature-derived resistance facets.
aedes_who_resistance_guidance maps WHO Aedes insecticide-resistance method and discriminating-concentration pages into resistance records with method terms and raw HTML provenance.

aedes_extracted_facts emits resistance candidate facts, supplement manifests, and parsed supported supplement table rows from indexed Aedes literature, with matched insecticide, assay, mortality, knockdown, LC value, mutation, genotype-frequency, and country terms when detected.
required_next_sources: WHO insecticide resistance database availability review
validated marker-frequency, haplotype, and genotype table extraction from papers and supplements beyond deterministic supported-format rows
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer resistance questions by species, country, insecticide class, assay, mutation, and source

domains.target_state: Habitat, climate, seasonality, range, breeding-site, urbanization, and environmental suitability evidence for Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates ecology records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 5,253 ecology records from aedes_literature_facets.
Ecology questions route through the ecology lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.
aedes_occurrence_ecology joins indexed GBIF, iNaturalist, and Mosquito Alert observation payloads into country, country-month, seasonality, range, and public habitat ecology records.

vectornet_aedes_surveillance adds official ECDC/EFSA regional surveillance ecology summaries by country and degree of establishment, preserving detection, absence-surveillance, and unclear-status counts.

aedes_worldclim_climate maps WorldClim historical and monthly climate source pages into queryable ecology source records, with raster sampling represented as a structured gap until GeoTIFFs are mirrored and sampled.
aedes_global_compendium_occurrence contributes row-level global Aedes aegypti occurrence records for compendium-specific ecology and distribution questions.
aedes_vectorbyte_traits adds trait rows with temperature, habitat, location, and lab-versus-field context where supplied by VectorByte/VecTraits.
The May 24, 2026 hosted ingest installed 1,985 aedes_occurrence_ecology records from 88,065 Aedes observation inputs, bringing the hosted ecology lane to 7,238 records.

aedes_extracted_facts emits ecology candidate facts from indexed Aedes literature and legal full-text units, plus parsed supported supplement table rows, including habitat, breeding-site, climate, seasonality, range, and location terms when detected.
required_next_sources: climate-linked GBIF and iNaturalist observation joins
climate and land-use layers with clear licenses
range and suitability model outputs
breeding-site and larval-habitat records from literature and surveillance reports
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer where, when, habitat, climate, seasonality, and range questions with source-backed records

domains.target_state: Surveillance, outbreak, intervention, vector-control, disease-transmission, and operational public-health records connected to Aedes aegypti.
current_evidence: aedes_literature_facets creates public_health records from source-grade Aedes literature metadata and legal full-text units.
Installed local and hosted artifacts contain 8,261 public_health records from aedes_literature_facets.
aedes_public_health_guidance maps official WHO, PAHO, CDC, and ECDC guidance pages into public_health records with raw HTML receipts and source URLs.

aedes_wolbachia_interventions maps World Mosquito Program Wolbachia method, deployment progress, and Yogyakarta trial evidence pages into public_health records with source-mentioned metrics and raw HTML provenance.

aedes_paho_dengue_surveillance parses official PAHO dengue situation report HTML into regional week, year-to-date, subregion, serotype, figure/table, dashboard page, and iframe locator public_health records with raw HTML receipts and PAHO media locators.

aedes_paho_dengue_surveillance parses PAHO/EIH Core Indicators ZIP/CSV rows where indicator_name is Dengue cases into annual country/territory public_health records with raw ZIP, CSV member, and row-number provenance.

aedes_who_dengue_surveillance parses official WHO dengue surveillance pages, WER global update pages, WPRO situation-update links, archive links, publication download locators, and WHO Western Pacific Health Data Platform dengue dashboard locators into public_health records with raw HTML provenance.

aedes_cdc_dengue_surveillance parses official CDC dengue current-year and historic pages, CDC WCMS visualization JSON configs, linked CDC CSV datasets, and ArboNET limitations into public_health records with page/config/CSV-row/limitation provenance.

PAHO/EIH Core Indicators annual country/territory dengue rows are proven machine-readable via ZIP/CSV, but underlying PAHO/PLISA country-week Tableau/PHIP rows remain a structured source gap until a stable weekly machine-readable CSV, JSON, or API endpoint is available or authorized access is obtained.

WHO dashboard locator records are queryable, but dashboard row-level data remains a structured source gap until WHO exposes a stable machine-readable export/API or explicit authorized access is obtained.
Public-health questions route through the public_health lane and return provenance back to source literature records and full-text units where available.

aedes_extracted_facts emits public-health candidate facts from indexed Aedes literature and legal full-text units, plus parsed supported supplement table rows, including case, death, intervention, location, date, serotype, and source terms when detected.
required_next_sources: WHO dashboard row/export parsing if a stable machine-readable export/API becomes legally accessible
PAHO and national dengue or arbovirus reports where public
additional CDC ArboNET public export surfaces where accessible beyond current/historic dengue CSV dashboards
structured intervention outcome and vector-control program datasets
completion_evidence: Ask Insects can answer surveillance, outbreak, intervention, and operational-control questions with date, place, disease, source, and provenance
